TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cihafayan, title = Cihafayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cihafayan} }

S.FORM: Cihafayan Itiniay i Fenglin Cen no Hualien ko Cihafayan a niyaro', 101 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 221 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 83% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 17% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 38 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ¶ińßafajan itiniaj i f…ôŇč…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ¶ińßafajan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Cihafayan Itiniay i Fenglin Cen no Hualien ko Cihafayan a niyaro', 101 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 221 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 83% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 17% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 38 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ¶ińßafajan itiniaj i f…ôŇč…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ¶ińßafajan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, taja…ĺ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
